description: A property owner has a new phone number. They've emailed the property manager to update their file.

nodes.task_description: Receive the email from the property owner with their new contact information.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies the owner and their new phone number.

nodes.task_description: Update the owner's profile in the property management software with the new phone number.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the contact record.

nodes.task_description: Send a confirmation email back to the owner stating that their information has been updated.
